---
title: 'OpenVLA-OFT: Fine-Tuning Vision-Language-Action Models'
description: An optimised fine-tuning recipe for OpenVLA — parallel decoding, continuous
  actions, action chunking, and optional FiLM.
categories:
- Robot Learning (VLA)
---

Paper: [arXiv:2502.19645](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.19645)

![OpenVLA-OFT fine-tuning recipe](/images/notes/openvla-oft-1.png)

OpenVLA-OFT keeps OpenVLA's DINOv2 + SigLIP vision and LLaMA-2 7B backbone, but changes the fine-tuning recipe — most importantly, moving from autoregressive discrete-token decoding to **parallel decoding of continuous action chunks**:

| Component | OpenVLA (2024) | OpenVLA-OFT (2025) |
|---|---|---|
| Vision backbone | DINOv2 + SigLIP dual ViT | Same |
| Language backbone | LLaMA-2 7B | Same |
| Fusion | Linear MLP projector → concat | Same + optional FiLM |
| Decoding | Autoregressive (causal mask) | Parallel (bidirectional mask) |
| Action representation | Discrete tokens (256-bin) | Continuous vector (normalised) |
| Output head | Linear → softmax | MLP action head (L1 loss) |
| Training objective | Cross-entropy (next token) | L1 regression (continuous) |
| Action chunking | Not feasible | Built-in (multi-timestep chunks) |
